case_title: TV ESPANOL VS ELECTRONIC FILING CENTER ATN: ARTURO CANIZALES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY TV ESPANOL AS TO DEFENDANT ELECTRONIC FILING CENTER  ATN: ARTURO CANIZALES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TV ESPANOL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ELECTRONIC FILING CENTER  ATN: ARTURO CANIZALES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TV ESPANOL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELECTRONIC FILING CENTER  ATN: ARTURO CANIZALES $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $441.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
